commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads optional plugin install records through plugin runtime load options, provider load state, loader cache context, and provenance building to avoid redundant `installs.json` reads.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was run; this is a maintainer performance cleanup rather than a user bug. Source inspection shows the current sync-read path and also shows a likely exact-test failure introduced by the new returned `installRecords` property.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair can update the runtime load-context test expectations or adjust empty-record emission without changing the PR's architecture.

target.title: perf(plugins): thread install records through plugin load options
target.body:
## Summary

Threads install records from a held `PluginMetadataSnapshot` through the plugin loader so downstream paths skip the synchronous `installs.json` read.

- Adds `installRecords?: Record<string, PluginInstallRecord>` to `PluginLoadOptions` (`src/plugins/loader.ts`); `resolvePluginLoadCacheContext` uses it, falling back to `loadInstalledPluginIndexInstallRecordsSync` only when not provided.
- Mirrors the field on `PluginRuntimeLoadContext` / `PluginRuntimeResolvedLoadValues` and forwards through `buildPluginRuntimeLoadOptionsFromValues` (`src/plugins/runtime/load-context.ts`); `resolvePluginRuntimeLoadContext` extracts records from the metadata snapshot via `extractPluginInstallRecordsFromInstalledPluginIndex`.
- Passes the same records through `resolveSetupProviderPluginLoadState` and `resolveRuntimeProviderPluginLoadState` from `params.pluginMetadataSnapshot` (`src/plugins/providers.runtime.ts`).
- `loader-provenance.ts` `buildProvenanceIndex` uses `params.installRecords ?? sync-read` instead of merging both — when the caller already supplied records they replace the read entirely.

Net diff: +20/-5 across 4 files, one commit.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: redundant `installs.json` reads on the plugin runtime load path when the caller already holds a `PluginMetadataSnapshot`.

Real environment tested: not yet — opening for review and CI.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: pending — will run targeted `pnpm check:changed` and any affected plugins/runtime tests before landing.

Evidence after fix: existing tests for `resolvePluginRuntimeLoadContext` / `buildProvenanceIndex` should continue to pass; the new `installRecords` parameter is purely additive (optional, falls back to the prior sync read when unset).

Observed result after fix: TBD on CI.

What was not tested: cold-start timing has not been re-measured in this PR.
target.author: romneyda
